name: octo-oke-autoscaling-ca-events
description: Cluster Autoscaler events from the OKE managed cluster-autoscaler add-on: ScaleUp / ScaleDown / NotTriggerScaleUp / pod-cannot-be-scheduled. Confirms that node-pool scale-out fired during the stress demo and pins down which pods triggered it.
queryString: 'Log Source' = 'Kubernetes Logs' and Subsystem = 'cluster-autoscaler' | stats count() by event, node, reason | sort -Time
